query: The air feels a bit heavy in the kitchen, how is the air quality for the room environment right now? And in the living room how much remaining time does dimmer light 1 have?

steps.thought: I need to check the air quality (PM10) in the kitchen first.
I have the kitchen air quality (PM10: 80.63 μg/m³). Now I need to find the dimmer light in the living room to check its remaining time.

I have retrieved the kitchen air quality (PM10: 80.63 μg/m³). I also checked the living room devices and confirmed that there is no 'dimmer light 1' in that room; only an on/off light is present. I will now provide the final answer to the user.

action_input.answer: The air quality in the kitchen is currently good, with a PM10 level of 80.63 μg/m³. Regarding the living room, there is no 'dimmer light 1' available; the room only contains an on/off light (living_room_on_off_light_1), so I cannot check its remaining time.

final_answer: The air quality in the kitchen is currently good, with a PM10 level of 80.63 μg/m³. Regarding the living room, there is no 'dimmer light 1' available; the room only contains an on/off light (living_room_on_off_light_1), so I cannot check its remaining time.
